title: Newsom admits it’s unfair. Democrats killed the fix. Republicans are done waiting.
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: California is allowing biological boys to compete in girls' sports.
Governor Newsom has referred to the situation in girls' sports as 'deeply unfair.'
National polling shows nearly 70% of Americans agree that biological males should not be allowed to compete in girls' events.
